_note: ToolSchema. Seeded from docs/audits/2026-06-toolschema-property-liveness.md. Tool metadata is WRITE-ONLY (projected one-way for Studio; runtime uses a separate AIToolDefinition). LIVE props are live via that same-named surface, not metadata read-back.

outputSchema.note: keys folded into description only; no validation exists.

category.evidence: listing/preview tag only; enum drift vs AIToolDefinition free-string

requiresConfirmation.note: HITL re-derives from action.ai.requiresConfirmation; never read off the def.

permissions.evidence: tool.form.ts only; not on AIToolDefinition, no consumer

active.evidence: never set by any registration path

builtIn.evidence: never set by any registration path
